hero.desc: Spend less time explaining. More time deciding.
features.label: Core features
features.title: Everything agents need to know your project.
features.0.title: Isolated workspaces
features.0.desc: One task, one workspace. Each agent gets its own branch, terminal, and file state. Switch between tasks without losing anything.
features.1.title: Memory that grows with your project
features.1.desc: .my-context and built-in memory accumulate decisions, notes, and session summaries automatically. Agents find context on their own. You stop repeating yourself.
features.2.title: Skills that remove the ceremony
features.2.desc: Define how you work once — review patterns, test rules, handoff steps. Every agent follows the same playbook, every time.
more.label: More
more.title: Everything else you need
more.0.title: Autopilot
more.0.desc: Schedule recurring agent jobs on a cadence — code reviews, health checks, weekly summaries — running automatically while you focus elsewhere.
more.1.title: PR visibility
more.1.desc: See pull request state, checks, and review status without leaving Yishan.
more.2.title: Works with your tools
more.2.desc: Open files in VS Code, Cursor, JetBrains, Sublime, Xcode, and more. Yishan bridges to your tools instead of replacing them.
more.3.title: Bring your own agent
more.3.desc: Works with OpenCode, Claude, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, and more. Use the agents you already know.
agents.label: Works with:
workflow.label: How it works
workflow.title: From first session to full context.
workflow.desc: Open a workspace and your agent already knows the project. Check in across tasks. Jump back in anywhere — everything exactly where you left it.
workflow.0.title: Open a workspace
workflow.0.desc: Your agent starts with project structure, past decisions, and context already loaded. No setup, no repeating yourself.
workflow.1.title: Check in across tasks
workflow.1.desc: One view shows every agent's state — running, waiting, done. Know what needs attention without opening each terminal.
workflow.2.title: Jump back in anywhere
workflow.2.desc: Terminals, files, and context are exactly where you left them. No setup cost, no lost progress.
footer.tagline: Built for developers who work with agents.
footer.desc: Less explaining, less repeating, less ceremony — from day one.
